summary: Detailed implementation plan for Phase 2 — Provider Matching Engine. Covers all 4 sub-tasks: 2.1 matching engine with hard filters + weighted scoring, 2.2 haversine distance utilities, 2.3 Gemini explanation caching, and 2.4 MatchResultsScreen frontend. Lists all files to create/modify, key design decisions, and a verification plan with specific test cases for gender hard-filter correctness.
